critical_issues: Toilet stalls are not properly realized: toilets are exposed behind partial privacy screens with no visible enclosed stall structures/doors (views 1, 3).
No visible natural daylight or warm ceiling-lighting cues; lighting reads flat/neutral and windowless, failing the target warm/daylit school style requirement (views 1-3).
Visual checklist requirement failed (daylight_and_warm_lighting): No visible daylight source (no window/light spill) and no clear warm ceiling lighting cues are shown; lighting appears neutral/flat.
Visual checklist requirement failed (inventory:toilets): Two toilets are visible, but they are not inside complete stalls (no enclosed stall structures/doors visible).

Visual checklist requirement failed (reference_style): While beige tile and some light wood are present, the space lacks the reference’s warm/daylit feel (no daylight and no clear warm lighting), reading comparatively sterile.

Visual checklist requirement failed (room_specific_arrangement): Overall boys restroom identity is present (urinals/sinks/toilets), but the required stall arrangement is incomplete (no proper stall enclosures/doors).
repair_instructions: Replace the current toilet privacy screens with two complete stall enclosures (side + front partitions) and add stall doors with handles/hinges; ensure each toilet is inside a usable stall and maintain door clearances (views 1, 3).

Introduce visibly warm interior lighting (warm ceiling fixtures) and/or believable daylight contribution (e.g., frosted window/transom or stronger daylight spill) to match the reference school’s warm, naturally lit finish (views 1-3).
Raise these combined scores to the pass threshold: object_relevance, placement_realism, prompt_alignment
room_prompt:
[SCENESMITH_SCHOOL_CONTRACT_V1 room_id=boys_toilet profile=school_reference_20260710]
Immutable effective prompt SHA-256: ac8d297cc9a2d605f41b4bcd7abd52aac29bfd0f195875840342ee1e6a7da86f

Use warm cream/beige/off-white walls, light wood furniture and flooring, soft daylight, warm ceiling light, organized school displays, realistic scale, greenery, and clear humanoid/robot circulation. Nothing may float, visibly interpenetrate, block a door, or eliminate a usable walking/turning path.

ROOM-SPECIFIC REQUIRED CONTENTS:
Create a clean compact boys school toilet with at least two toilet fixtures/stalls, at least two urinals, at least two sinks and mirrors, stall partitions, soap dispenser, paper-towel dispenser or hand dryer, trash bin, tiled floor/walls, and unblocked access.

--- FLOOR-PLANNER CONTEXT (SECONDARY) ---
Compact boys school restroom west of the shared public foyer.

critical_issues: Toilet stalls are not properly realized: toilets are exposed behind partial privacy screens with no visible enclosed stall structures/doors (views 1, 3).
No visible natural daylight or warm ceiling-lighting cues; lighting reads flat/neutral and windowless, failing the target warm/daylit school style requirement (views 1-3).
observations: Room contains double-sink vanity with two mirrors, soap dispensers, a wall-mounted dispenser/dryer unit, a trash bin, two urinals, and two toilets; beige tiled floor/walls and light-wood vanity are present (views 1-3).
Clear central floor area provides good robot/humanoid maneuvering space and fixtures do not appear to block the entry swing area (view 1).
Toilet area lacks full stall privacy and reads unlike a typical school boys restroom stall layout (views 1, 3).
repair_instructions: Replace the current toilet privacy screens with two complete stall enclosures (side + front partitions) and add stall doors with handles/hinges; ensure each toilet is inside a usable stall and maintain door clearances (views 1, 3).

Introduce visibly warm interior lighting (warm ceiling fixtures) and/or believable daylight contribution (e.g., frosted window/transom or stronger daylight spill) to match the reference school’s warm, naturally lit finish (views 1-3).

clear_circulation.label: Door clearance, aisles, and humanoid/robot circulation are visibly usable.
clear_circulation.observation: Large open central area and clear approach zones to sinks/urinals/toilets are visible; no obvious doorway blockage in the top view.

collision_free_support.label: Objects are supported, correctly scaled, and visibly free of collisions/floating.
collision_free_support.observation: Fixtures and partitions appear grounded and aligned to floor/walls with no obvious floating or severe interpenetration visible.

daylight_and_warm_lighting.observation: No visible daylight source (no window/light spill) and no clear warm ceiling lighting cues are shown; lighting appears neutral/flat.

inventory:trash.observation: A trash bin/can is visible on the floor in the top-down view.

room_specific_arrangement.observation: Overall boys restroom identity is present (urinals/sinks/toilets), but the required stall arrangement is incomplete (no proper stall enclosures/doors).
